allow: Bash(cd "D:/VarsaNetra/Aperant" && timeout 5 npm run build:start 2>&1 || true)
Bash(cd "D:/VarsaNetra/Aperant" && mv .auto-claude .aperant 2>/dev/null && echo "Renamed .auto-claude to .aperant" || echo "Directory may not exist or already renamed")
Bash(cd "D:/VarsaNetra/Aperant" && mv .auto-claude-security.json .aperant-security.json 2>/dev/null && echo "Renamed security file" || echo "Security file may not exist")
